uncertain.reason: Placeholder example; could be customer_account_number or bank_customer_reference and may be excluded as a non-real record
Lowercase and described as non-binding; some detectors only flag capitalised or signed versions
Compliance phrase not always on enumerated lists; detection coverage may vary

Storage-location restriction is governance control; not always explicitly mapped to barrier markers
